app_release_notes: v1.2.25 - Your in-progress work now sticks around: leaving the Measure Target screen (or clicking Create New Load) no longer wipes what you were doing. Compare Loads now shows a composite score for each load and fills in the CBTO. Manual charge entry starts blank with a clear delete button on each row. Plus a clearer 'how many groups are on this photo?' question, a progress indicator when saving your marked targets, snappier Library tabs, and a fix for a green flash when saving a load.
